title: import_slot_v1 — manifest contract for population-atlas JSON-slot capture
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_slot'. Wraps GET /api/population/{slot} (the population_endpoint.py sidecar) and emits a staging_population_slot_v0 layer. target.slot must be one of the eight non-templated slots exposed by GET /api/population/slots: per_sample_stats, family_clusters, inversion_carriers, marker_controls, hatchery_health_cohorts, pcangsd_pca, ngsrelate_kinship, module_qc_summary. K-templated NGSadmix Q matrices use 'import_ngsadmix_q' (different action because the URL carries the K parameter).
